payload.claim_text: NY Undergrade Bridge Repair Program includes Hudson line sites (GCT Track 17 Flag Repairs 0% complete, GCT 47th Street Passage Red Flag 100% complete, Park Ave Tunnel Concrete Vault Repairs 0% complete, Park Avenue Viaduct Masonry Arch Repairs Phase 1 25% complete, Park Ave Viaduct Flag Repairs Phase 2 10% complete, Wappinger Falls Flag Repairs 70% complete), Harlem line (Pondfield Road Steel Concrete Repairs 50% complete), Port Jervis line (Ramapo River Flag Repairs 75% complete, Laura Lane Replacement 40% complete, Woodbury Creek Phase 2 Column Flag Repairs 25% complete, Beacon Bridge Removal 10% Complete)
